q: What makes you feel most desired?
options: The way they look at me
When they can't keep their hands off me
When they say exactly what they feel
When they choose me over everything else

q: Your biggest relationship craving right now?
The most attractive thing someone can do?

options: Cook together, music on, wine open

q: What's the fastest way to your heart?
options: Make me laugh until I can't breathe
Send me something that reminded you of me
Tell me what you actually feel, no filter

q: The energy you want more of in this relationship?

options: When they laugh so hard they cry
When they dress up for no reason
When they look at me like that

q: What would you do with 24 hours alone together?
options: Stay in bed literally all day
A full date day — morning to midnight

q: The text that would make your heart skip?
options: 'I made us a plan for tonight'
'I just want to be next to you'

q: What you secretly wish your partner knew?
options: How much their touch means to me
How often I replay our best moments
That I'd choose them again every time
That I'm still falling for them
